source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer (Innovate)
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE



Yubo is the Social Discovery app to make new friends and hang out online. By eliminating likes and follows, we empower our users to create genuine connections and show up as their true selves.



We've pioneered a new way for Gen Z to socialize online, and with millions of active users, our goal is to redefine how we connect today and tomorrow.



Our team is international, multicultural and deeply committed to its mission. As the leading platform to socialize online, we have a special responsibility to build a safe digital space for our community. Safety is embedded in our DNA, and our proactive approach focuses on user protection, support, and education. We also work closely with the broader technology industry to share our knowledge and NGOs create industry-leading child protection standards.



Join us in this exciting journey and help us shape the future of social interactions!


ABOUT THIS ROLE

As Yubo continues to scale and roll out its 2026 Tech organization, we’re launching a brand new Innovate squad focused on bold product bets and high-risk initiatives.

This squad’s mission?
Make big bets, test ambitious features, and validate them through continuous experimentation.

We’re looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Backend Experience team, reporting directly to Armand (Engineering Manager).

You will be embedded in a multi-disciplinary squad (Product, Mobile, Design, Data) alongside one Senior Backend Engineer, co-lead of the squad.

Your role?
Design, ship, and operate high-risk backend experiments that validate bold product bets, while keeping systems resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient within a fast iteration cycle.

This is not a “maintenance” role.
It’s about building, testing, rolling back, iterating and learning fast.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES


EXPERIMENTS & PRODUCT BETS

 - Design and deliver backend capabilities from specs to production rollout/rollback.

 - Define and instrument success metrics with cross-functional partners.

 - Iterate quickly based on experiment results (KPIs, dashboards, quantitative signals).


ARCHITECTURE & OPERABILITY

 - Build resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient systems adapted to high-risk experimentation.

 - Diagnose and fix complex production issues using logs, metrics, and observability tools.

 - Anticipate operational impact (deployment, rollback, monitoring, cost).


STANDARDS & KNOWLEDGE SHARING

 - Strengthen team-level best practices and reusable patterns.

 - Contribute to documentation, RFCs, and internal usability of squad-owned systems.

 - Mentor peers through code reviews and pairing (mentorship is a plus, not mandatory).




OUR TECHNICAL ENVIRONMENT / TOOLS WE USE

 - Backend: Node.js & TypeScript

 - Architecture: Event-driven systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS)

 - Databases: NoSQL, key-value stores, relational databases

 - Observability: Datadog, Grafana

 - Practices: RFC processes, technical specs, structured decision-making




WHO YOU ARE

 - You have 5+ years of backend experience, ideally in startup/scale-up environments.

 - You are proficient in Node.js and TypeScript.

 - You have solid experience designing APIs (performance, security, observability).

 - You have worked with event-driven systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS).

 - You apply strong engineering best practices (testing, code quality, resilience).

 - You have a product mindset and enjoy collaborating closely with Product.

 - You communicate clearly and can explain complex technical topics to non-technical stakeholders.

 - You are comfortable working in English in an international environment.

Nice to have:

 - Experience in scalable architecture design.

 - Experience mentoring peers.

 - Familiarity with RFC-style structured decision-making.




IN YOUR FIRST 6 MONTHS, YOU WILL

 - Ship at least one high-risk, country-scoped backend experiment end-to-end, including safe rollout/rollback and measurable success metrics

 - Establish lightweight, reusable experi

source_jobs.title: Staff ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE



Yubo is the Social Discovery app to make new friends and hang out online. By eliminating likes and follows, we empower our users to create genuine connections and show up as their true selves.



We've pioneered a new way for Gen Z to socialize online, and with millions of active users, our goal is to redefine how we connect today and tomorrow.



Our team is international, multicultural and deeply committed to its mission. As the leading platform to socialize online, we have a special responsibility to build a safe digital space for our community. Safety is embedded in our DNA, and our proactive approach focuses on user protection, support, and education. We also work closely with the broader technology industry to share our knowledge and NGOs create industry-leading child protection standards.



Join us in this exciting journey and help us shape the future of social interactions!


ABOUT THIS ROLE

As Yubo continues to scale, Machine Learning is becoming a core production layer, powering critical systems across safety, recommendations, and product optimization.

What makes this role unique is both the scale and diversity of our data, and the level of maturity we are aiming to reach.

We process massive volumes of images, text, and real-time user interactions, across millions of users worldwide, creating a wide range of high-impact ML challenges, including:

 - Content moderation (image, text, behavior)

 - Recommendation systems and user engagement optimization

 - Behavioral detection and trust & safety models

 - Emerging use cases such as dynamic pricing and growth optimization

At the same time, our current ML stack is still evolving.
Legacy models are not fully integrated into pipelines, lifecycle management remains inconsistent, and our approach can sometimes resemble “develop, deploy, and forget.”

As ML usage expands across the company, this creates increasing complexity and dependency on reliable, well-structured systems.

There is still a huge amount of untapped potential, with many ML use cases yet to be designed, tested, and scaled, but unlocking it requires building a more robust and scalable ML operating model.

We are therefore looking for a Staff ML Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team, reporting directly to Mikael (Head of Platform Engineering).




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES


ML SYSTEMS & DELIVERY

 - Deliver end-to-end ML use cases (recommendation, safety algorithms, etc.).

 - Ensure production readiness, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

 - Balance speed of delivery with robustness and reliability .


ML LIFECYCLE & RELIABILITY

 - Define and improve the full ML lifecycle (training, deployment, monitoring, iteration).

 - Establish KPIs and monitoring standards to track model performance over time.

 - Ensure continuous alignment with product and safety objectives .


PLATFORM & STANDARDIZATION

 - Contribute to the “ML as a Platform” strategy (tools, workflows, reusable components).

 - Define scalable standards for ML development across teams.

 - Enable self-service ML capabilities .


LEGACY & ADVANCED USE CASES

 - Take ownership of legacy models and realign them with current business needs.

 - Improve, retrain, and integrate them into modern pipelines.

 - Define standards for LLM usage (moderation, recommendation).

 - Explore and implement advanced ML approaches where relevant .


CROSS-FUNCTIONAL LEADERSHIP

 - Partner with Data Engineering, MLOps, Backend Platform, and Product teams.

 - Act as a bridge between ML, platform, and business stakeholders.

 - Bring technical leadership and structure to ML practices across the organization.
   
   


OUR TECHNICAL ENVIRONMENT / ML SCOPE

 - ML frameworks: PyTorch

 - Languages: Python (data stack)

 - Core topics: Neural networks, LLMs, data sampling

 - Use cases: Recommendation systems, safety algorithms, moderation

 - Ecosystem: Data Engineering, MLOps pipelines, Backend Platform
   
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - You hav

source_jobs.title: Senior ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE



Yubo is the Social Discovery app to make new friends and hang out online. By eliminating likes and follows, we empower our users to create genuine connections and show up as their true selves.



We've pioneered a new way for Gen Z to socialize online, and with millions of active users, our goal is to redefine how we connect today and tomorrow.



Our team is international, multicultural and deeply committed to its mission. As the leading platform to socialize online, we have a special responsibility to build a safe digital space for our community. Safety is embedded in our DNA, and our proactive approach focuses on user protection, support, and education. We also work closely with the broader technology industry to share our knowledge and NGOs create industry-leading child protection standards.



Join us in this exciting journey and help us shape the future of social interactions!


ABOUT THIS ROLE



As Yubo continues to scale, Machine Learning is becoming a core production layer, powering critical systems across safety, recommendations, and product optimization.

What makes this role unique is both the scale and diversity of our data, and the level of maturity we are aiming to reach.



We process massive volumes of images, text, and real-time user interactions, across millions of users worldwide, creating a wide range of high-impact ML challenges, including:

 - Content moderation (image, text, behavior)

 - Recommendation systems and user engagement optimization

 - Behavioral detection and trust & safety models

 - Emerging use cases such as dynamic pricing and growth optimization



At the same time, our current ML stack is still evolving.

Legacy models are not fully integrated into pipelines, lifecycle management remains inconsistent, and our approach can sometimes resemble "develop, deploy, and forget."

As ML usage expands across the company, this creates increasing complexity and dependency on reliable, well-structured systems.



There is still a huge amount of untapped potential, with many ML use cases yet to be designed, tested, and scaled. Unlocking it requires continuously improving the reliability, scalability, and maturity of our ML systems and workflows.

We are therefore looking for a Senior ML Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team, reporting directly to Mikael (Head of Platform Engineering).



You will play a key role in delivering ML initiatives across the company, helping turn promising ideas into reliable production systems. You'll work on everything from model development and experimentation to deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement, while contributing to the evolution of our ML platform and engineering practices.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES




ML SYSTEMS & DELIVERY

 - Deliver end-to-end ML use cases (recommendation systems, safety algorithms, moderation models, etc.).

 - Design, train, evaluate, and deploy ML models where appropriate.

 - Balance speed of delivery with robustness and reliability.


ML LIFECYCLE & RELIABILITY

 - Drive improvements across the ML lifecycle (training, deployment, monitoring, iteration).

 - Establish KPIs and monitoring standards to track model performance over time.

 - Ensure continuous alignment with product and safety objectives.

 - Help improve the reliability and observability of production ML systems.


PLATFORM & STANDARDIZATION

 - Contribute to the evolution of our ML platform through tools, workflows, and reusable components.

 - Help establish and promote scalable ML engineering practices across teams.

 - Contribute to improving self-service ML capabilities where relevant.


LEGACY & ADVANCED USE CASES

 - Take ownership of legacy models and realign them with current business needs.

 - Improve, retrain, and integrate them into modern pipelines.

 - Contribute to best practices around LLM usage in moderation, recommendation, and other product domains.

 - Explore and implement advanced ML approaches where relevant.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE



Yubo is the Social Discovery app to make new friends and hang out online. By eliminating likes and follows, we empower our users to create genuine connections and show up as their true selves.



We've pioneered a new way for Gen Z to socialize online, and with millions of active users, our goal is to redefine how we connect today and tomorrow.



Our team is international, multicultural and deeply committed to its mission. As the leading platform to socialize online, we have a special responsibility to build a safe digital space for our community. Safety is embedded in our DNA, and our proactive approach focuses on user protection, support, and education. We also work closely with the broader technology industry to share our knowledge and NGOs create industry-leading child protection standards.



Join us in this exciting journey and help us shape the future of social interactions!


ABOUT THIS ROLE


At Yubo, Product Managers don't just manage roadmaps. They help define how millions of people discover, connect, and meet new people without the pressure: no expectations, no predefined outcomes, just the freedom to explore new connections online.

We're looking for a Senior Product Manager to join our Product team and help shape the future of Social Discovery. Someone who can identify opportunities, create clarity in ambiguity, and turn insights into measurable impact.

You'll join one of our product squads and take ownership of a strategic product area. This could mean improving recommendations, exploring new product experiences, scaling monetization, strengthening safety, or leveraging AI to unlock new ways for people to discover, connect, and meet others.

What makes this role particularly exciting is the combination of scale, complexity, and impact. Millions of people use Yubo, and every conversation, livestream, friendship, purchase and interaction generates signal at scale. You'll work with Engineering, Design, Data, Safety, Marketing and Machine Learning to turn those signals into better experiences.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing strategic thinking with hands-on execution, and who wants to have a direct impact on engagement, retention, recommendation quality, safety, monetization, and the future of Social Discovery.

Like what you're reading already? I think you'll enjoy what follows.





YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Define a clear product strategy for your squad and translate company objectives into measurable outcomes

 - Own your squad roadmap and continuously prioritize the highest-impact opportunities for users and the business

 - Lead Discovery & Experimentation: Use user insights, data, and market signals to identify opportunities, run experiments, measure impact, and inform product decisions.

 - Partner closely with Engineering, Design, Data, Machine Learning, Marketing, Operations, and Trust & Safety teams

 - Drive product initiatives end-to-end, from problem framing and discovery to launch and post-release analysis

 - Balance user experience, business objectives, technical constraints, and long-term platform health

 - Create alignment across stakeholders and lead without direct authority through clear communication and structured decision-making

 - Continuously improve how your squad operates, learns, and delivers value
   
   
   


TOOLS WE USE

 - Amplitude, SQL, Looker

 - Figma

 - Notion

 - Slack

 - Enterpret

 - AI tooling: Claude Code, ChatGPT Codex, Dust
   
   


WHO YOU ARE

 - You have 5+ years of experience as a Product Manager, ideally in a startup or scale-up environment

 - You have worked on consumer, social, mobile, gaming, marketplace, or subscription-based products

 - You have strong product strategy and roadmap ownership experience

 - You have the conviction to defend a strong product point of view and make bold calls

 - You are comfortable moving between discovery, execution, analytics, and stakeholder management

 - You know how to define mean

notes: Small job board with high tech role ratio, likely a startup with international and multicultural team.
